74936.subject: Ethereum's Coordination Layer: EF Plan Lands, Ethlabs Spins Out
74936.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

**These are the biggest stories in Web3:**

* **[Ethereum Foundation's](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/ethereum-foundation-csa-execution-plan-mev-privacy-eth-pay)**[ interim ED lays out strategy](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/ethereum-foundation-csa-execution-plan-mev-privacy-eth-pay)

* **[Five former EF researchers](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/five-former-ef-researchers-launch-ethlabs-independent-nonprofit-rd-lab-ethereum)**[ launch Ethlabs](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/five-former-ef-researchers-launch-ethlabs-independent-nonprofit-rd-lab-ethereum)

* **[WSJ](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/wsj-1-9m-fake-bets-polymarket-creator-videos)**[ says $1.9M in fake bets propped up Polymarket](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/wsj-1-9m-fake-bets-polymarket-creator-videos)

* **[ENS DAO](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/ens-dao-temp-check-empowering-ens-foundation-treasury-handover)**[ opens temp check on handing treasury to ENS Foundation](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/ens-dao-temp-check-empowering-ens-foundation-treasury-handover)

* [Ethereum's most active sandwich bot was drained for $7.5M](https://thedefiant.io/news/hacks/jaredfromsubway-eth-mev-bot-drained-7-5-million-counter-mev-honeypot)

Ethereum's coordination layer reshuffled in public Monday. The **Ethereum Foundation**'s interim executive director [released the 'EF Way' execution plan](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/ethereum-foundation-csa-execution-plan-mev-privacy-eth-pay) вҖ” a tighter agenda built around MEV elimination, privacy primitives, and ETH-as-payment work вҖ” three days after [Hsiao-Wei Wang stepped down as co-executive director](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/ethereum-foundation-hsiao-wei-wang-resigns-co-executive-director). The same morning, [five former EF researchers launched Ethlabs](https://thedefiant.io/news/people/five-former-ef-researchers-launch-ethlabs-independent-nonprofit-rd-lab-ethereum), an independent non-profit R&D lab for Ethereum.

The two announcements split EF's prior research footprint into a tighter execution org and a parallel external lab. Ethereum now has **two non-profits steering its R&D** вҖ” and the question for the next two-year cycle is whether the interim ED's plan and Ethlabs' agenda converge on shared roadmap or diverge into parallel tracks. Add to that the **ENS DAO** opening a temp check on handing day-to-day operational and treasury authority to the ENS Foundation, and Monday becomes another day filled with foundation-vs-DAO governance questions we've seen this year.

**Read more below!**

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

74933.subject: ObjednГЎvka OFV34023
74933.body: DobrГҪ deЕҲ pГЎn/pani Oleh Novosadov ДҺakujeme VГЎm za objednГЎvku OFV. RekapitulГЎcia VaЕЎej objednГЎvky: Kurzy OFV: KAPITГҒLOVГқ TRH - strednГҪ stupeЕҲ (OFV) (1 rok) Meno: Oleh Novosadov Adresa trvalГ©ho bydliska: Trieda SNP 83 04011 KoЕЎice Fak. adresa: Trieda SNP 83 04011 KoЕЎice SlovenskГЎ republika Email: novosadovoleg@gmail.com PoznГЎmka: POZOR DГ”LEЕҪITГҒ INFORMГҒCIA ! ДҺakujeme VГЎm za zaslanie objednГЎvky kurzov OFV. ObjednГЎvka bola prijatГЎ na spracovanie. Po spracovanГӯ prihlГЎЕЎky VГЎm e-mailom poЕЎleme zГЎlohovГә faktГәru. Po Гәhrade FA VГЎm poЕЎleme prГӯstup do aplikГЎcie na vzdelГЎvanie. Ak ste na Гәhradu OFV pouЕҫili platobnГә brГЎnu, prosГӯm poДҚkajte na ДҸalЕЎie emaily. SBA EDUCA email: podpora@sbaeduca.sk web: www.sbaeduca.sk

74932.subject: рҹ”· The Daily: Taiko warns users to pull funds
74932.body:
Altura winds down stablecoin vault after 'unprecedented level' of withdrawal requests | Michael Saylor's Strategy buys another 520 BTC for $35 million, adds to USD reserve despite STRC slide | Bank of England drops proposed holding caps for sterling stablecoins, sets ВЈ40 billion issuance guardrail | Ethereum 'tax' debate erupts over proposal to redirect portion of staking rewards to ecosystem funding |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

Figure Markets ( https://figuremarkets.onelink.me/Plnq/theblocknewsletter?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Monday! Analysts said ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405557/between-supportive-and-restrictive-forces-bitcoin-stalls-near-64000-as-fed-rate-hike-risk-overshadows-iran-ceasefire-relief?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) *bitcoin* is stuck near $64,000 as *Fed* rate-hike fears and continued ETF outflows eclipse the relief rally sparked by the U.S.-Iran ceasefire.

In today's newsletter, *Taiko* halts block production following an exploit, *Altura* winds down its stablecoin yield vault, *Strategy* adds to its *bitcoin* treasury and *USD reserve* despite *STRC's* slide, and more.

Meanwhile, *MoneyGram* became ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405568/moneygram-solana-validator-blockchain-payments?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) a *Solana* validator, expanding its blockchain payments strategy.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read вҖ” and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*вҡ пёҸ Ethereum Layer 2 Taiko halts block production following exploit; urges users to withdraw funds*

Taiko ( https://www.theblock.co/post/405486/taiko-confirms-exploit?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Taiko* confirmed an exploit in its chain state verification mechanism and warned users to withdraw funds from all bridges deployed on the *Ethereum* Layer 2 network.

* The project said all bridges on Taiko should be treated as insecure and asked centralized exchanges to suspend deposits of its native token until further notice.
* Taiko halted new block production across all proposers while it investigated the incident and worked with its Security Council and ecosystem partners to contain the breach.
* The team said an attacker exploited a flaw in bridge message-proof verification, allowing forged proofs to

74930.subject: Sir Keir Starmer may be a hard act to follow
74930.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTV9AAcAAAAAAwoerM-NSbjg7au3tRQmQfchm7EKnQZGhCO1ZYMAtmZJmaBFqEpbHdIbKMo6GOaL_-1sF0-k1sd6qJRsnZtvl6A4Ou2bsrawX2TDLCZhcw 

June 22nd 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTV9AAcAAAAAAwoerM-OsDZ-TY9z9J2zxnfzKDBjSdRWMN9gly3Eer3m9kWyXziYTdOzpw6B9C8JYsEZR7MNU5xxkfJv3PVVlGvHxtF8i9aFmaGO8ed1CA 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTV9AAcAAAAAAwoerM-P7n0h3sR5gfUib7dfr_hxskQWfYoW1veQnj_mx28s5-pgw04b92bBdKyr92UCzrT5fSR3ftBp0c71pPOzw1uFdRy4NF5lqDfAsQ 



 
 

Bo Franklin

Senior digital editor



 Six weeks ago we published an article entitled “Sir Keir Starmer is on the way out”. Some of us worried the headline was premature: what if he clung on? Not a chance. This morning he resigned, and it looks increasingly like Andy Burnham will replace him without a contest. But Mr Burnham faces 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MTV9AAcAAAAAAwoerM-QnsT3OUmnaKwr3wLo452FbYb9-gdH_i22U9pPYd-qFi3RAs937joJXKuRvGAE4h2poXy8UlPOUGaHI8XR2YYMBPDwISUU 
many of the same problems  
 that Sir Keir did. 


 Each year China gives out labour medals to celebrate and motivate beleaguered workers. This year’s honour roll is heavy on technicians and Communist Party apparatchiks and light on the gig workers driving the economy. Our

74929.subject: Data & Insights: Stablecoin Sees Slide in Search Interest
74929.body:
The Data and Insights newsletter brings the highlights of the week from The BlockвҖҷs Data Dashboard

( https://www.theblock.co/data/crypto-markets/spot )

Presented by:

( https://www.bitgo.com/products/trading/?utm_source=theblock&utm_medium=prime&utm_campaign=derivatives_report )

Gm data enjoyors! Summer is here! This week, weвҖҷre watching the World Cup continue to drive volume across prediction markets. We recommend giving it a check.

1: World Prediction Cup

( https://www.theblock.co/data/decentralized-finance/prediction-markets/polymarket-and-kalshi-open-interest-daily )

Chart via The Block's Data Dashboard

*Key Insights* provided by The Block Research

* Polymarket's вҖң Soccer ( https://www.theblock.co/data/decentralized-finance/prediction-markets/polymarket-daily-volume-per-category-sports ) вҖқ category saw over $2 billion in volume during the first ten days of the World Cup, a 300% increase over the prior ten-day period.

* At the same time, daily average volume for the category grew from $53 million in the month before kickoff to ~$220 million during the tournament so far.
* The mechanical driver behind this growth is straightforward: the worldвҖҷs most popular, most-anticipated, quadrennial tournament, having multiple daily sports matches for an entire month, where each match is a short-dated event market that resolves within 90 minutes.

* Polymarket isnвҖҷt the only prediction market that has enjoyed the fruits of the World Cup, as Kalshi's aggregated open interest ( https://www.theblock.co/data/decentralized-finance/prediction-markets/polymarket-and-kalshi-open-interest-daily ) (OI) reached a record $1.16 billion on Thursday, the first time the platformвҖҷs OI surpassed the billion mark.

* This marks a 350% YTD increase for KalshiвҖҷs OI.
* Interestingly, PolymarketвҖҷs OI levels have remained relatively flat even during the World Cup, while the OI in PolymarketвҖҷs US arm, which is also CFTC-regulated like Kalshi, has only increased modestly, failing to even reach its April 2026 highs.

* The more interesting story to highlight, therefore, lies in the Polymarket-Kalshi OI divergence.

* KalshiвҖҷs OI has been compounding faster than its trading volume, indicating a user base with longer hold periods on betting positions and the emergence of larger directional positioning rather than scalping.
* Kalshi's CFTC-regulated rails and direct USD on-ramp give it a structural edge for US institutional and high-net-worth doll
